hooks.command: if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA:-}" ] && [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && npm install --silent 2>&1 | tail -1) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"; [ -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" ] && [ ! -e "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules" ] && ln -s "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/node_modules" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/node_modules" || true; fi

if [ -f .storyline/blueprint.yaml ]; then version=$(awk '/^  version:/{print $2; exit}' .storyline/blueprint.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); project=$(awk '/^  project:/{sub(/^  project: */,""); gsub(/["]/,""); print; exit}' .storyline/blueprint.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); echo "Storyline active (blueprint v${version} — ${project}). Use /storyline:the-foreman to add features or check status. Do NOT explore the codebase directly — read the blueprint instead."; fi

if [ -f .storyline/blueprint.yaml ] && [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then mkdir -p .claude/agents; for agent in developer-amigo testing-amigo frontend-amigo security-amigo; do src="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/agents/${agent}.md"; dst=".claude/agents/${agent}.md"; if [ -f "$src" ]; then if [ ! -f "$dst" ] || [ "$src" -nt "$dst" ]; then sed '0,/^---$/!{0,/^---$/{s/^---$/permissionMode: acceptEdits\n---/}}' "$src" > "$dst" 2>/dev/null && echo "Synced ${agent} to .claude/agents/"; fi; fi; done; fi

input=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); file_path=$(echo "$input" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')||'{}'); const ti=d.tool_input||d; console.log(ti.file_path||ti.command||'')" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE 'blueprint\.yaml$|storyline (add-|stamp|housekeeping)'; then storyline validate 2>&1 || true; fi

input=$(cat); agent_type=$(echo "$input" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')||'{}'); console.log(d.agent_type||'')" 2>/dev/null || echo ''); file=".storyline/personas/${agent_type}.md"; if [ -f "$file" ]; then mtime=$(node -e "console.log(Math.floor(require('fs').statSync('$file').mtimeMs/1000))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); age=$(($(date +%s) - mtime)); if [ "$age" -gt 30 ]; then echo "WARNING: ${agent_type} finished without updating their persona memory at ${file}. Re-dispatch with explicit instructions to update memory."; fi; else echo "NOTE: ${agent_type} has no persona memory file yet at ${file}. This is expected for the first session."; fi
